title: BAL Rapid-Flex One Tile Adhesive
description: BAL Rapid-Flex One Tile Adhesive White - 20kg is enhanced with fibre strand technology (FST), which improves flexibility and strength. It has an extended open time of 30 minutes and a working time of 60 minutes and can be grouted after only three hours. It can be used on walls and floors, internally and externally, and has a smoother consistency for easier mixing and application. The S1 classified adhesive can be used to fix most types of tiles and natural stone, rigid foam insulation materials, and brick slips. BAL Rapid-Flex One is available in white but can be used with any colour grout.
features: FST formulation for improved flexibility and strength.
Smoother consistency for easier mixing and application.
